verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Help me Holy Ghost, I need You more than anything, All my best ideas are Yours, So what am I but what You make of me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So help me God, Breathe on my weakness, For all I want is to be like Jesus, I don't have much, But what I have is Yours to use, So make my whole life Your upper room.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Help me Holy Ghost, I need You more than I can say, May Your thoughts become my own, Till the Father's will be done in me.
